reclassified_items.title: Stabilize baseline to frozen state
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Baseline is already baseline_frozen_with_notes; emergency blocker posture removed.
reclassified_items.operator_action: Close missing artifacts/operational blockers, then regenerate baseline freeze artifact.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: baseline_status becomes baseline_frozen or baseline_frozen_with_notes with explicit accepted notes.

reclassified_items.title: Clear operator policy blockers
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Policy gate is not blocked; can move to managed carry-forward execution.
reclassified_items.operator_action: Resolve policy-required artifacts and rerun policy generation in allowed maintenance window.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: operator_policy status is no longer blocked and remediation triggers are clear.

reclassified_items.title: Clear operator readiness blockers
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Policy gate is not blocked; can move to managed carry-forward execution.
reclassified_items.operator_action: Close readiness artifact gaps and align section verdicts with operator policy.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: operator_readiness status is no longer blocked and section checks are resolved.

reclassified_items.title: Convert planning notes into tracked closure tasks
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Planning note-closure remains accepted track-prep work.
reclassified_items.reason: planning remains with notes and requires explicit closure sequencing
reclassified_items.operator_action: Create operator-owned checklist for every carry-forward note and assign closure evidence format.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: all carry_forward_notes are mapped to closed or deferred backlog items with explicit owner/date.

reclassified_items.title: Carry-forward note closure #1
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Carry-forward note should stay visible but not block track entry by itself.
reclassified_items.reason: Source verdicts are frozen snapshot values and must be re-frozen only after explicit operational update.
reclassified_items.operator_action: Translate note into a concrete operator task with evidence checkpoint.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: note has evidence link and is marked closed or deferred with rationale.

reclassified_items.title: Carry-forward note closure #2
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Carry-forward note should stay visible but not block track entry by itself.
reclassified_items.reason: Operator policy remains the primary gate decision artifact for go/no-go calls.

reclassified_items.closure_rule: note has evidence link and is marked closed or deferred with rationale.

reclassified_items.title: Carry-forward note closure #3
reclassified_items.triage_comment: Carry-forward note should stay visible but not block track entry by itself.
reclassified_items.reason: Any unresolved notes from readiness/governance/handoff remain active until explicitly cleared.
reclassified_items.operator_action: Translate note into a concrete operator task with evidence checkpoint.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: note has evidence link and is marked closed or deferred with rationale.

reclassified_items.title: Constraint drift watch #1

reclassified_items.operator_action: Keep periodic operator check that the constraint remains intact during planning execution.
reclassified_items.closure_rule: no violations recorded for the constraint across the next phase checkpoint.
